reviews.name: places/ChIJ0Z4xd3pP5IkRcNtmySI4m9I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25BeFkxOXdjRlYyUkhwblpWWldNakJsT0VoNWFXYxAB
reviews.text: Retired Mma fighter turned full time dad and Father time has a funny way of creeping up on you. I'm going to be going in for some surgeries soon and had a lot of concerns on a steadfast recovery. In comes my introduction to Gameday Men's Health, from the moment I walked through the door, I was guided by friendly staff, consulted with one of the physicians in detail what my goals were, and came up with a gameplan that worked best for my needs. They took to the time to walk me through each and every step of the way to make sure I was 100% confident and secure. I can't say enough good things about Gameday, so glad I was able to choose them for my peptide treatment and look forward to continuing working with them throughout my recovery and beyond. Special shout out to Maria, Amber and Liam. Thank you for all you do!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0Z4xd3pP5IkRcNtmySI4m9I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201eVdUUmpVV0ZtUVhKMVR6aDVPWEZtVDNWZlYxRRAB
reviews.text:
I’ve had an excellent experience with Game Day Men’s Health. The entire team is extremely professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely friendly. From the moment you walk in, they make you feel comfortable and take the time to explain everything clearly without any pressure.

They’ve been incredibly helpful with my journey, and the process has been smooth and well-organized every step of the way. You can tell they truly care about their patients and want to help you feel your best.

Highly recommend to any guy or girl looking to improve their health, energy, and overall well-being. Great staff and great experience every time.

reviews.name: places/ChIJ0Z4xd3pP5IkRcNtmySI4m9I/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWTldHTlVlSE5MZFU5TlZWVTJURlowWlVWUmNFRRAB
reviews.text:
I  had an outstanding experience at GameDay Men’s Health. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel welcome, comfortable, and genuinely cared for. The clinic is extremely clean, professional, and well-organized, which immediately gave me confidence that I was in the right place.

What really stood out was how knowledgeable and approachable the medical team was. They took the time to explain everything clearly, answered all my questions, and created a treatment plan tailored specifically to my needs. I never felt rushed or pressured—just supported and informed throughout the entire process.

Since starting treatment, I’ve noticed a huge improvement in my energy levels, focus, and overall well-being. It’s made a real difference in my daily life. The follow-up and ongoing support have also been excellent, which shows they truly care about their patients’ results and health.

If you’re considering men’s health treatment, I highly recommend GameDay Men’s Health. Professional staff, top-notch service, and real results. 💪⭐ It’s easily one of the best healthcare experiences

reviews.name: places/ChIJo4-XBGhP5IkRrlKeDzPFoBE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t0Qk4wWm9SMGxHV21KWGNsSkhiQzE0Y25kdU1rRRAB
reviews.text:
I'm so happy that a friend referred me to Anderson Longevity Clinic, and specifically Dr. Emilissa Domingo. Since I started seeing her a little over a year ago (initially for hrt and now also for weight management and injury recovery), I feel like I've gotten back on track physically and mentally, and I'm healthier than I have been in years. She is compassionate and caring, and takes the time to answer all of my questions, both during my visits and over email. I feel empowered to make informed decisions about my healthcare in a way that I haven't experienced before.

The office is beautiful, and everyone who works there is friendly and helpful. I don't even mind having my blood draw by their amazing phlebotomist. Everyone is also super responsive, and I never have trouble reaching anyone by phone or email. Dr. Domingo even saw me same-day when I had an injury that was unrelated to my regular care there.

They don't take insurance, but I've found the prices to be reasonable for the excellent services and care that they provide, and the lack of insurance involvement seems to allow for maximum personalization, efficiency, and flexibility in decision making. The clinic is amazing!

reviews.name: places/ChIJo4-XBGhP5IkRrlKeDzPFoBE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xNNFpVZHlZbWhHTkVwT1JuRjJaMjlTUkRsSVZuYxAB
reviews.text: I had the pleasure of being seen by Dr. Domingo for my perimenopause symptoms. I highly recommend her as a provider. A GYN is not trained to take care of our symptoms. Being under the care of a professional and knowledgeable specialist makes the world of difference. I feel confident under her care. It is true that insurance does not cover the medications/service. That is an insurance issue not a service issue. However, you get what you pay for. It’s worth it.

reviews.name: places/ChIJo4-XBGhP5IkRrlKeDzPFoBE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psallrNUJaak5QVlRSR2JVcFBRVE5aTTFaV2RHYxAB
reviews.text: Molly and the whole staff at Anderson Longevity have been amazing! My Obgyn was less than helpful when it came to my peri/ menopause symptoms! Molly has been a life saver - she has listened to my symptoms and has helped me immensely! Using my bloodwork, to personalize my treatment has seriously changed my life for the better! I feel so much better!! Thank you !!

reviews.name: places/ChIJo4-XBGhP5IkRrlKeDzPFoBE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pNeU5sWkdWM0l3Tmxvd1p6ZFdSQzFOYUhoQ1dXYxAB
reviews.text:
As a Board-Certified Functional Health Practitioner, I am very selective about who I refer my clients to — and Dr. Domingo and the team at Anderson Longevity Clinic are exceptional. Their expertise in BHRT (bioidentical hormone replacement therapy), chelation, and advanced longevity services truly sets them apart.

I’ve confidently referred many clients to their practice, and each one has had a positive, supportive, and professional experience. Their approach aligns beautifully with root-cause, whole-body wellness, and they take the time to provide thoughtful, personalized care.

If you’re looking for a trusted clinic for hormone optimization, detox support, or longevity medicine, I highly recommend Anderson Longevity Clinic.

reviews.name: places/ChIJo4-XBGhP5IkRrlKeDzPFoBE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xCM1lVdDNZWEY2U0VoTFNYTXRWRkZyT0dWdk9FRRAB
reviews.text: The facility is conveniently located with plenty of parking. The office is very clean, organized and comfortable. The staff is kind thoughtful and helpful. The phlebotomist Melissa is gentile quick and efficient. APRN Molly Linnane takes her time getting to know her patients and listens to all concerns, is very knowledgeable and explains every detail of the plan she creates, supplements and the labs. I am so grateful to have found her and this clinic.

reviews.text: There was a time this office was kind of nice   Some older male providers who were sympathic to their patients' situations.  The older docs seems gone now, and the office seems to be run by a dour younger female physician, who has all the bedside manner of AI.  The vibe is cold and unfriendly.  Not sure of there are other local options, but if there are, you should explore them.

They take the time to get to the root of your problem. Your not rushed in and out. My doctor Mark Paulos MD is a professional who cares about his patients. I was very pleased with the care and respect I received while being treated. I highly recommend the Men's Health Center.

reviews.name: places/ChIJdUFhWelb5IkR8qsNYlg93vY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21aRVVHTTJiRmhSYkRGM1gyWnFRVEUxUTA5WFYxRRAB
reviews.text:
Before coming to this Men’s Health Center, I honestly felt like I was dying. Something was terribly wrong with me — constant exhaustion, no energy, no motivation — and even my primary care doctor couldn’t figure it out. I genuinely thought I had some kind of undetected cancer because of how bad I felt.

Finding this place changed everything.

They discovered my testosterone levels were dangerously low, and for the first time, things finally made sense. They didn’t just slap a quick fix on it — they built a plan, explained everything, and actually listened to me. Once my testosterone started moving in the right direction, I felt like myself again… honestly, like I was in my 20s.

On top of that, they set me up with a program that didn’t just manage my low testosterone, but addressed my overall health and weight. Since starting, I’ve lost 83 pounds and counting, and I feel better than I have in years — physically, mentally, and emotionally.

I can’t say enough good things about Dr. Leonard and Jose. Their care, attention, and genuine concern for my well-being have been incredible. I will be eternally grateful to them and this entire team for giving me my life back.

If you’re struggling and feel like no one has answers — come here. It might just change your life like it did mine.

reviews.name: places/ChIJdUFhWelb5IkR8qsNYlg93vY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR2bkt5T2F3EAE
reviews.text: I started treatment with this clinic after leaving my last doctor. Best move I ever made. Amazing staff and very knowledgeable. Always going the extra mile for patients.

reviews.name: places/ChIJdUFhWelb5IkR8qsNYlg93vY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoNE96ZktBEAE
reviews.text:
I was referred to CMH-RI by a friend who also uses services here. From start to finish Dr. Bolanos was a man of his word! He got me in promptly at which time I met with Dr. Berkowitz also really great and helpful doctor. Right away I felt like I was not only a patient but a friend really personable doctors. Dr. Bolanos reached out during each step and made the process simple and painless. The doctors at this office are the best around. They work around any issues you may have including tele-visits if you can’t make it to their office for some reason and the patient portal is easy to use and amazing! Give them a shot you will not regret it!!

Thank you CMH-RI for everything!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJdUFhWelb5IkR8qsNYlg93vY/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNE5MVEN3EAE
reviews.text: Great group of Doctors. They make the process simple and enjoyable. Both Dr. Bolanos and Dr. Berkowitz have great communication/follow up skills and you never feel alone in the process. I strongly recommend CMH-RI.

reviews.name: places/ChIJdUFhWelb5IkR8qsNYlg93vY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROODVIOGdBRRAB
reviews.text: Great people, great service at a very reasonable price. They try very hard to keep costs down for the patient and work with Insurance, would recommend to anyone looking for a mens health specialist.

reviews.name: places/ChIJad4EYhFF5IkRV3Rm_evOy6s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKWU9DMTRRMGRqZGxkSk5UbEhiMmN5UW1WMFkzYxAB
reviews.text:
Game Day Health & Wellness has completely changed the way I feel, both physically and mentally. From the moment I walked in, the staff made me feel supported, energized, and motivated. Their approach is professional, personalized, and genuinely focused on helping you become the best version of yourself.

After my first session, I felt recharged in a way I haven’t felt in years. The combination of their care, expertise, and wellness treatments truly energized me and made me feel like a new person. My body felt lighter, my mind felt clearer, and I walked out with a renewed sense of confidence and strength.

If you’re looking for a place that goes beyond basic wellness and actually transforms how you feel day-to-day, I highly recommend Game Day Health & Wellness. It’s more than a service—it’s an experience that elevates your health, boosts your energy, and brings you back to life.

reviews.name: places/ChIJad4EYhFF5IkRV3Rm_evOy6s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25kd1pWTlNTM1JyVkhNdGJtUkNkbmxWZHkxS2FWRRAB
reviews.text: Amazing experience from walking in the door. Front desk staff was warm, friendly and attentive. Made me feel comfortable and welcome - as if they had been preparing specifically for me and no one else. Clinical staff were just as warm and friendly and clearly very good at what they do - again making me feel safe and comfortable. My procedure was performed seamlessly, everything explained to me clearly and all questions answered. I left feeling amazing! Couldn’t recommend more highly.

reviews.name: places/ChIJad4EYhFF5IkRV3Rm_evOy6s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSbmFqQlhaV3RTVTFjNWFteFFabXczU0dOQ2MwRRAB
reviews.text: I recently visited Game Day and I was really impressed by their dedication to men’s health. The staff was knowledgeable and made me feel comfortable from the moment I walked in. They offer a range of services tailored to men’s wellness needs, and I appreciated the personalized approach. Definitely a great choice if you’re looking for quality men’s health care.”

reviews.name: places/ChIJad4EYhFF5IkRV3Rm_evOy6s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21kUVluUkRWemxxUWxKbmExRmZhSFZxU0RnNFQyYxAB
reviews.text: This place has truly amazing.  The staff is polite, knowledgeable, friendly and always welcoming.  They provide accurate information and analysis of results of tests.   They provide a very affordable option for improved health and performance. I will recommend them to anyone I have in my inner circle.

reviews.name: places/ChIJad4EYhFF5IkRV3Rm_evOy6s/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKT05sbHFNbU01UnpKdGNXbGhWbnBSUlZkM1gzYxAB
reviews.text: Wonderful crew here from the greeting to the atmosphere and the service was perfect. Walked in knowing nothing to leaving with the knowledge I needed about my physical health. Highly recommend coming here.

reviews.name: places/ChIJqRdzyytL5IkRpqzB0jhhiqw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGcFozWkthWEkwWTFoVFNGQklVbTFwUzNGeFZuYxAB
reviews.text:
The staff at this location are amazing!!! They treat you like family as soon as you walk in the door. They seem to genuinely care about helping you get better. They answered any question I had and made it easy to talk about the issues I was there to address.
Great experience all around, I would definitely recommend to others!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJqRdzyytL5IkRpqzB0jhhiqw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21JeWNVVXRNWEpMYUROcU1VdHVZMDFKWkdNMWNrRRAB
reviews.text: Great experience, my husband had an appointment and I was there to support him. Everyone was very welcoming, kind and enthusiastic to help. They all were very knowledgeable of their products, and always mentioned caring for our health and that was their top priority. At the end I walked out as a customer as well and I can’t wait to see how the products work, and how it makes us feel. Thank you Ricky and your whole team!

reviews.name: places/ChIJqRdzyytL5IkRpqzB0jhhiqw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGeFNqZHJWVXQzYWtacWJVUlpWVXBGTFZGb1dXYxAB
reviews.text: These guys are absolutely awesome, I was only there for about an hour and got set up with a treatment plan that I can't wait to start. Everyone was so nice and helpful, definitely will be recommending some friends to get treated here.

reviews.name: places/ChIJqRdzyytL5IkRpqzB0jhhiqw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25SWUxUTTBTRXRuY0ZrNU1saHFXVUZLU2kxcFZYYxAB
reviews.text:
I had a great experience at Northeast Men’s Health! The staff here are super friendly and make you feel comfortable right away. They really take the time to listen and explain things clearly, which I really appreciated.
Scheduling was easy, and the whole process was smooth from start to finish. You can tell everyone here actually cares about their patients and wants you to feel your best.
Definitely recommend Northeast Men’s Health if you’re looking for a place with great customer service and people who truly care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJqRdzyytL5IkRpqzB0jhhiqw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xoUWRFaGtXVWxKWjJ4dmRuTjBUSFZEVTB4a1FrRRAB
reviews.text: The staff at Northeast men’s Health made me feel at ease from the moment I walked in through the doors. They were friendly, kind and informative. The overall experience was great. I look forward to my treatment and getting to know the staff.

reviews.name: places/ChIJM7M4gbHn5YkRgdmLRj_aXXg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21STmExRjRXblZWWVhVNE1WZGxaVmRoZUhaeFJsRRAB
reviews.text: Dr Furtado is the whole package for Women's health and well being!  She addressed so many of my concerning issues as a postmenopausal gal. Hormone Imbalances, Weight gain, Insulin resistance and Anxiety... to name a few. She not only educates you, but helps implement a comprehensive program to recreate balance and good health. I am so glad I found her!

reviews.name: places/ChIJM7M4gbHn5YkRgdmLRj_aXXg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tKU1MzVjFlWEp6U0VRMU9HVXdiRmxwYWtSTGIyYxAB
reviews.text:
I see Dr. Furtado as my primary care provider.  I feel heard.  She spends time listening to her patients, explaining causes of conditions, and what treatments aim to do (the how and why). You can see her brain working as she looks at lab results and compares what she's seeing to what she's hearing.
She is the rare provider who listens to her patients. Appointments are easy to come by.  A human being answers the phone, or calls you back on the same day!

reviews.name: places/ChIJM7M4gbHn5YkRgdmLRj_aXXg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGdk1URmlNbGxpWTBsSmVqQm1kbE5UV21kWlJuYxAB
reviews.text: I’ve been seeing Doctor Furtado at Seaside Primary Care and feel great. She truly listens, understands my goals, and has helped me make real improvements in my health — highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJM7M4gbHn5YkRgdmLRj_aXXg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2t4TlREZEVXWGhZU0ZFdFJGZHJhRzlEY0U5Q04xRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Furtado is amazing!!! So understanding and down to earth. She wants to find the cause of any issues. I love her wish I found her years ago!

reviews.name: places/ChIJM7M4gbHn5YkRgdmLRj_aXXg/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pCUE5uZENPR1poVFU1eFlrSkNUMmhxU2pSQlVXYxAB
reviews.text: Dr. Furtado is wonderful.  She has been so supportive in helping me through my weight loss journey.  I highly recommend her to anyone looking for primary care or to lose weight.
